message.content:
@startuml
participant "Registry Authority [Registry Submission Definition Creator]" as RA
participant "Registry Definition Repository [Registry Submission Definition Repository]" as RDR

RA -> RDR : 1. Create submission definition artifacts.
RA <-- RDR

RA -> RDR : 2. Update submission definition artifacts.
RA <-- RDR

RA -> RDR : 3. Create submission definition artifacts.
RA <-- RDR

RA -> RDR : 4. Update submission definition artifacts.
RA <-- RDR

@enduml
